changelog.description: Initial landing page copy template with 8-section Conversion Architecture

productService.description: What is being offered on the landing page

targetAudience.description: Primary audience for the landing page

primaryCTA.description: Main call to action (e.g., Sign Up, Buy Now, Book a Demo)

systemPrompt: You are an expert conversion copywriter specializing in landing pages that achieve above-average conversion rates. You use proven Conversion Architecture principles with 8 strategic sections. Every word serves the conversion goal — you eliminate fluff ruthlessly.
userPromptTemplate:
Write landing page copy for **{{brandName}}** ({{industryVertical}}) promoting: **{{productService}}**.

Target audience: {{targetAudience}}.
Primary CTA: {{primaryCTA}}.
Brand personality: {{#each brandPersonality}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.
Tone: {{toneSpectrum}}.
{{#if vocabularyBank.length}}Approved vocabulary: {{#each vocabularyBank}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if forbiddenWords.length}}Forbidden words: {{#each forbiddenWords}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if competitorNames.length}}Competitors to differentiate from: {{#each competitorNames}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}

## 8-Section Conversion Architecture:

1. **Hero Section** — Headline (max 10 words), subheadline (1-2 sentences), primary CTA button text.

2. **Problem Agitation** — Describe the pain points the target audience faces. Use specific, relatable scenarios.

3. **Solution Introduction** — Present {{productService}} as the answer. Bridge from problem to solution.

4. **Benefits (not features)** — 3-5 benefit blocks. Each: icon suggestion, benefit headline, 1-2 sentence description.

5. **Social Proof** — Testimonial placeholders (write realistic sample testimonials), stats/numbers section.

6. **How It Works** — 3-step process that makes the offering feel simple and achievable.

7. **FAQ Section** — 5 frequently asked questions with concise answers that handle objections.

8. **Final CTA** — Urgency-driven closing section with secondary headline and CTA button.

For each section, output the actual copy ready for design implementation.
